headline: Ten-Year Pivotal Data Demonstrate Long-Term Durability of Edwards Lifesciences’ Resilia Tissue
summary: CHICAGO, May 02, 2026--Edwards Lifesciences (NYSE: EW) today announced 10-year results from the COMMENCE aortic trial, reinforcing the long-term durability and sustained performance of its proprietary RESILIA tissue. The data were presented at the 106th American Association for Thoracic Surgery Annual Meeting.
